subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! The reality of all things proclaimeth with eloquent tongue, "Glorified be my Lord, the All-Glorious," yea, even in the very essence of stone and clay [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء حقیقت اشیا بلسان بلیغ میگوید سبحان ربی الابهی و هویت حجر و مدر
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
